heading: Prohibition on disposal of sewage sludge at landfills on Staten Island
label: 1414c Prohibition on disposal of sewage sludge at landfills on Staten Island
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in subsec. (b)(1), means , which is classified generally to this chapter, chapter 41 (§ 2801 et seq.) of this title, and chapters 32 (§ 1431 et seq.) and 32A (§ 1447 et seq.) of Title 16, Conservation.Pub. L. 92–532

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: No person shall dispose of sewage sludge at any landfill located on Staten Island, New York.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraph (2), a person who violates this section shall not be subject to any penalty under this Act.

children.heading: Injunction
children.label: 2 Injunction
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not prohibit the bringing of an action for, or the granting of, an injunction under with respect to a violation of this section.section 1415 of this title

children.heading: “Sewage sludge” defined
children.label: c “Sewage sludge” defined
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “sewage sludge” has the meaning such term has in .section 1414b of this title
